name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】M82957 Blue Denim! Single zipper wallet series Zippy Coin Purse. This zipper coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLm pattern using jacquard weaving technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. Dimensions: 11*8.5*2cm. 🎁🎁
